use_cases: Displaying labels or tags on content items such as articles, products, or user profiles
Showing status indicators with color-coded variants for different states
Adding notification counts or small indicators to UI elements
Categorizing content with tags using the outline variant
Creating pill-shaped labels for interactive elements with hover states
ai_summary: A versatile badge component with multiple style variants including default, secondary, destructive, and outline options. Features rounded pill-shaped design with hover states and focus ring accessibility. Perfect for creating labels, tags, and status indicators in any interface.
